Hero.subtitle: Join K-Aqua and build the infrastructure that sustains life. We are seeking ambitious minds to push the boundaries of polymer engineering.

CTA.title: Become the Catalyst
CTA.subtitle: If you have the drive to be part of an ever-growing success story and want to join a modern company pushing the limits of engineering, we want to hear from you.

items.q: Do you offer remote work options?
items.a: Depending on the role, we offer flexible hybrid and fully remote arrangements. Engineering and production roles typically require on-site presence, while sales and admin roles offer more flexibility.

items.q: What is the onboarding process like?
items.a: New hires go through a comprehensive 4-week onboarding program covering our products, culture, systems, and deep-dives with key department heads.

items.q: Are there opportunities for international relocation?
items.a: Yes, as a global company, we frequently offer internal mobility and relocation opportunities across our international offices.

items.q: How does K-Aqua support professional development?
items.a: We provide an annual learning budget, internal mentorship programs, and paid time off for relevant certifications and industry conferences.

Benefits.title: Comprehensive Benefits
Benefits.subtitle: We demand the best from our team, and we provide the best in return. Our benefits package is designed to support your professional and personal life.

items.title: Comprehensive Health
items.desc: Top-tier health coverage prioritizing your well-being and peace of mind.

items.title: Continuous Learning
items.desc: Generous budgets for courses, certifications, and industry conferences.

items.title: Flexible Operations
items.desc: Core working hours with flexibility to manage your personal schedule.

items.title: Modern Facilities
items.desc: State-of-the-art office spaces designed for focus, collaboration, and comfort.

items.title: Premium Amenities
items.desc: In-house catering, specialty coffee, and relaxation zones.

items.title: Performance Bonus
items.desc: Competitive compensation packages with performance-based incentives.

JobPostings.title: Open Roles
JobPostings.subtitle: Find your place in our growing organization. We are actively hiring across multiple departments.

HiringProcess.title: The Hiring Process
HiringProcess.subtitle: Transparent, efficient, and respectful of your time.

items.title: Application Review
items.desc: Our recruitment team carefully reviews your profile against our current requirements and future needs.

items.title: Initial Conversation
items.desc: A brief call to discuss your background, motivations, and answer any immediate questions about K-Aqua.

items.title: Technical/Expertise Interview
items.desc: A deep dive into your professional skills with the hiring manager and team members.

items.title: Final Offer
items.desc: We extend a competitive offer and discuss your integration plan into our global team.

Culture.title: Our Culture
Culture.subtitle: An environment designed for those who demand excellence and thrive in high-performing teams.

items.title: Collaborative Excellence
items.desc: Our teams operate with high trust and autonomy. We believe the best ideas win, regardless of hierarchy or tenure.

items.title: Innovation First
items.desc: We invest heavily in R&D. From advanced PP-RCT compounds to automated extrusion lines, innovation is our baseline.

items.title: Continuous Growth
items.desc: We challenge archaic norms. Your career path at K-Aqua is limited only by your ambition and drive to learn.

Manifesto.title: The Manifesto
Manifesto.quote: "Water is the essence of life, but infrastructure is what delivers it. We build the arteries of modern civilization with uncompromising precision and German engineering."
Manifesto.description: At K-Aqua, we don't just manufacture pipes. We engineer resilient systems that guarantee the safe transport of the world's most valuable resource. We are aggrandising by design—constantly seeking growth, scale, and capability.

Locations.title: Our Headquarters
Locations.subtitle: Located in the heart of Germany, our central campus is the hub of our global operations. It houses our main R&D laboratories, executive offices, and the core engineering teams driving our international expansion.

MarketPosition.title: Unrivaled Position
MarketPosition.subtitle: We hold a dominant market position, but we consider it only the beginning. Our trajectory is steep, and our expansion is continuous.

items.title: Global Reach
items.desc: Expanding across continents, our water supply solutions are the backbone of megaprojects worldwide.

items.title: Aggressive Growth
items.desc: An aggrandising company that never stands still. We reinvest heavily in R&D and talent.

items.title: Market Leadership
items.desc: Setting the standard for quality, durability, and safety in the PP-R and PP-RCT industry.

items.title: Uncompromising Quality
items.desc: Certified excellence. Our manufacturing process guarantees zero-failure tolerances in extreme conditions.

items.title: Fluid Dynamics
items.desc: Mastering the physics of water transport. Every fitting and pipe is optimized for maximum efficiency.

items.title: Modern Infrastructure
items.desc: Operating a state-of-the-art facility where automation and human expertise work in perfect synthesis.
